supplierQuality.notes: GDUFA registered. One minor finding on cleaning validation, CAPA on track.
Strong dimensional control. Re-audit now overdue per 18-month cycle.
Provisional pending initial on-site audit scheduled Q3. EXCiPACT certified.
For-cause audit after serialization deviation. Conditional approval; 3 CAPAs open, 90-day re-audit committed.
Suspended after repeated OOS results and data integrity concern. Removed from ASL pending remediation.

qmsRecords.title: OOS result on assay - Tablet Batch B2401
qmsRecords.descriptionDetail: Assay result 92.4% below specification of 95-105% on initial testing. Phase I lab investigation in progress.

qmsRecords.title: CAPA - Recurring fill weight variation on Line 3
qmsRecords.rootCause: Worn dosing pump seals causing weight drift
qmsRecords.descriptionDetail: Three deviations in Q1 traced to fill weight excursions on Line 3.
qmsRecords.actionPlan: Replaced dosing seals, added monthly PM, retrained operators. Monitoring 5 batches for effectiveness.

qmsRecords.title: Change supplier of HDPE bottle closures
qmsRecords.descriptionDetail: Proposed qualification of secondary closure supplier to mitigate single-source risk.
qmsRecords.actionPlan: Supplier audit, three validation lots, regulatory variation filing.

qmsRecords.title: Foreign particulate observed in syrup sample
qmsRecords.descriptionDetail: Black particulate found during visual inspection. Batch quarantined and rejected.
qmsRecords.actionPlan: Batch destroyed, filter integrity test added to BMR, retrospective review completed.

qmsRecords.title: Customer complaint - blister pack seal failure
qmsRecords.descriptionDetail: Pharmacy reported two strips with incomplete seal. Retained sample requested.

regulatoryRegistrations.notes: Bioequivalence accepted; annual report due each January.
Day 120 List of Questions received; clock stopped pending response.
Manufacturing site change; PMDA requested additional stability data.
Dossier compilation in progress; target ARTG submission Q3 2026.

edmsControlledDocuments.title: Cleaning Validation of Tablet Compression Equipment
edmsControlledDocuments.author: R. Mehta
edmsControlledDocuments.changeReason: CC-2025-118: Added rinse-sampling acceptance limits per updated MACO calc.
edmsControlledDocuments.notes: Distribution: QA, Production, Engineering. Training mandatory before use.

edmsControlledDocuments.title: Handling of Out-of-Specification (OOS) Results
edmsControlledDocuments.author: A. Iyer
edmsControlledDocuments.changeReason: CC-2026-007: Aligned phase-I/II investigation flow with FDA OOS guidance.

edmsControlledDocuments.title: Gowning Procedure for Grade B/C Aseptic Areas
edmsControlledDocuments.author: L. D'Souza
edmsControlledDocuments.changeReason: CC-2026-019: Updated per EU GMP Annex 1 (2023) revision.

auditMgmt.title: Annual Internal GMP Self-Inspection - Production
auditMgmt.scope: Tablet manufacturing line, dispensing, compression and coating areas
auditMgmt.notes: Two major observations on cleaning record gaps; remediated via CAPA-2026-014.

auditMgmt.title: USFDA Pre-Approval Inspection Readiness Mock Audit
auditMgmt.scope: Full site readiness for upcoming FDA PAI - data integrity, aseptic processing, QC labs
auditMgmt.notes: Critical: audit trail review not documented for HPLC. CAPA initiated, gap assessment ongoing.

auditMgmt.title: Supplier Qualification Audit - API Vendor Sinochem
auditMgmt.scope: On-site qualification of API supplier - process controls, change control, impurity profile
auditMgmt.notes: Vendor approved with conditions pending CAPA on solvent recovery validation.

auditMgmt.title: For-Cause Audit - Repeated OOS in QC Microbiology
auditMgmt.scope: Investigation triggered by recurring sterility OOS results in Q1 2026
auditMgmt.notes: Root cause: inadequate media fill frequency and operator gowning lapses.

auditMgmt.title: ISO 9001 Surveillance Audit - External Certification Body
auditMgmt.scope: Annual surveillance of QMS - document control, management review, internal audit program
auditMgmt.notes: Surveillance audit scheduled; opening meeting agenda circulated.

recallActions.reason: Out-of-specification dissolution results detected during stability testing; potential sub-potency risk to patients.
recallActions.notes: Class I escalation; daily recovery tracking required. Press release issued.

recallActions.reason: Labeling error: incorrect reconstitution volume printed on carton may lead to under-dosing.
Minor printing defect on blister foil; no impact on product safety or efficacy.
recallActions.notes: Cosmetic only; recall completed and closed.

recallActions.reason: Particulate matter (glass fragments) detected in vials during retained-sample inspection.
recallActions.notes: Urgent field safety notice dispatched to hospitals; recovery escalation ongoing.

recallActions.reason: NDMA nitrosamine impurity above acceptable intake limit identified in batch testing.
recallActions.notes: Pending QA decision board sign-off before notification; batch not yet distributed to retail.

pvAdverseEvents.reaction: Patient developed severe rash and facial swelling within 2 hours of dose
pvAdverseEvents.reporter: Dr. A. Mensah, Korle-Bu Teaching Hospital
pvAdverseEvents.narrative: 54-year-old female with hypertension treated with Cardizolol 50mg presented with angioedema and urticaria approximately 2 hours post-dose. Drug discontinued; treated with antihistamines and corticosteroids. Symptoms improving at time of report.
Non-serious expected GI event consistent with product label. Case closed after listedness confirmation; no regulatory expedited reporting required.

pvAdverseEvents.reaction: Stevens-Johnson syndrome with mucosal involvement, patient hospitalized in ICU
pvAdverseEvents.narrative: Literature case of SJS/TEN spectrum reaction in young female on Neurazepine. HLA-B*15:02 status unknown. Expedited 7-day report initiated. Contributes to validated cutaneous-reaction signal under PRAC review.

SAE of febrile neutropenia in oncology trial subject, expected per Investigator Brochure. SUSAR assessment: expected, therefore reported as non-expedited SAE per protocol. Resolved with G-CSF support and antibiotics.
Hy's Law-suggestive hepatocellular injury (DILI) flagged as Designated Medical Event requiring single-case medical review. Confounders under assessment; case in QC prior to expedited submission.

serializationSerials.notes: Unit serial commissioned at bottle labeler; aggregated into shipper case SER-0003.
Duplicate serial detected during EMVS upload; held pending investigation (CAPA opened).
Homogeneous case aggregating 144 sellable units; child-parent links uploaded to repository (EPCIS).
Decommissioned at point of dispense (pharmacy scan); serial retired in national system.
SSCC pallet aggregating 24 cases; ASN/EPCIS shipping event sent to wholesaler 3PL.

mesProductionOrders.notes: Compression in progress; tablet hardness within range.
Hold pending deviation investigation on capsule weight variability.
Aseptic fill complete; awaiting QA batch record review.
Order released to floor; dispensing reconciled.
Batch record reviewed, approved and archived.

formulaRecords.ingredients: Paracetamol IP 500mg; Maize Starch; PVP K30; Magnesium Stearate; Talc; Purified Water (removed)
formulaRecords.manufacturingProcess: Wet granulation, drying at 55C, sizing, lubrication, compression, in-process IPQC every 30 min.
formulaRecords.revisionHistory: v3.2 — Granulating agent changed from starch paste to PVP K30 to improve dissolution (CC-2025-0142).

formulaRecords.ingredients: Amoxicillin Trihydrate (eq. to 250mg); Microcrystalline Cellulose; Sodium Starch Glycolate; Magnesium Stearate; Hard Gelatin Capsule Shell #2
formulaRecords.manufacturingProcess: Dry blending, capsule filling on automatic encapsulator, polishing, weight-sort.
formulaRecords.revisionHistory: v1.0 — New product introduction, pending QA approval and stability data.

formulaRecords.ingredients: Dextromethorphan HBr; Sucrose; Glycerin; Sodium Benzoate; Citric Acid; Flavour; Colour; Purified Water q.s.
formulaRecords.manufacturingProcess: Syrup base preparation at 70C, active dissolution, filtration through 5 micron, volume make-up.
formulaRecords.revisionHistory: v2.1 — Colour vendor change, equivalent shade, minor change (CC-2025-0067).

formulaRecords.ingredients: Sterile Ceftriaxone Sodium (eq. to 1g Ceftriaxone); Nitrogen flush; USP Type I glass vial
formulaRecords.manufacturingProcess: Aseptic powder filling under Grade A laminar flow, nitrogen purge, rubber stopper, flip-off seal.
formulaRecords.revisionHistory: v4.0 — Superseded by v5.0; vial supplier qualification updated. Retained for traceability.

formulaRecords.ingredients: Diclofenac Diethylamine; Carbomer 940; Triethanolamine; Isopropyl Alcohol; Propylene Glycol; Purified Water q.s.
formulaRecords.manufacturingProcess: Carbomer dispersion, neutralization with TEA, active phase addition, homogenization, de-aeration.
formulaRecords.revisionHistory: v1.3 — Trial batch under R&D; carbomer concentration optimization for viscosity.

validationRecords.title: IQ/OQ/PQ of Lyophilizer LYO-02
validationRecords.acceptanceCriteria: Shelf temperature uniformity +/-1 degC; vacuum leak rate < 0.1 mbar/min; all alarms verified.
validationRecords.notes: All IQ/OQ test scripts executed; equipment qualified and released for PQ.

validationRecords.title: CSV of LIMS LabWare v8 Configuration
validationRecords.acceptanceCriteria: Audit trail integrity, e-signature controls, role-based access and data backup/restore verified per Part 11.
validationRecords.discrepancies: DR-04: e-signature timeout not enforced - under investigation.
validationRecords.notes: OQ scripts in progress; PQ scheduled post discrepancy closure.

validationRecords.title: Process Validation - Metformin 500mg Tablets
validationRecords.acceptanceCriteria: Three consecutive PPQ batches meet blend uniformity, content uniformity (AV<=15), dissolution Q+5%, and assay 98-102%.
validationRecords.discrepancies: Minor - one tablet hardness OOT, addressed via control strategy update.
validationRecords.notes: PPQ batches manufactured; validation report under QA review.

validationRecords.title: Cleaning Validation - Coating Pan CP-01 (Worst-case)
validationRecords.acceptanceCriteria: Carryover MACO and 10ppm criteria met; swab/rinse recovery >=80%; visually clean; TOC within limit.
validationRecords.discrepancies: DR-09: rinse sample TOC exceeded limit at sampling point S3 - reswab/investigation ongoing.
validationRecords.notes: Worst-case product matrix study; awaiting discrepancy resolution before report.

validationRecords.title: Analytical Method Validation - HPLC Assay (Atorvastatin)
validationRecords.acceptanceCriteria: Specificity, linearity (r>=0.999), accuracy (98-102%), precision (RSD<=2%), LOD/LOQ, robustness per ICH Q2(R2).
validationRecords.notes: Method validated; revalidation now due following 2-year periodic review.

stabilityStudies.testParameters: Assay, Related Substances, Dissolution, Water Content, Appearance
Assay, pH, Reconstituted Stability, Microbial Limits
stabilityStudies.notes: Slight assay decline at 6-month accelerated; monitor at long-term.

stabilityStudies.testParameters: Potency (HPLC), High Molecular Weight Proteins, pH, Particulates
stabilityStudies.notes: Refrigerated long-term per ICH Q1A; in-use study running in parallel.

stabilityStudies.testParameters: Appearance, Assay, Related Substances per ICH Q1B Option 2
stabilityStudies.notes: Photostability complete; no significant change vs dark control.

stabilityStudies.testParameters: Assay, pH, Particulate Matter, Sterility, Container Closure Integrity
stabilityStudies.notes: 3-month impurity result trending out; OOT investigation INV-2026-077 open.

demandForecasts.notes: Flu season uplift confirmed; expedite PO with primary supplier.
Long lead time; cold-chain capacity to be reserved. Government tender pending.
Over-forecast vs actual; hold reorders, review promo plan.
Approaching reorder point; monitor weekly offtake.

biKpiRegistry.title: On-Time In-Full (OTIF) Delivery
biKpiRegistry.definition: Orders delivered complete and on the requested date / total orders shipped
biKpiRegistry.notes: Dip driven by cold-chain carrier delays in the north region.

biKpiRegistry.title: Right First Time (RFT) Batch Release
biKpiRegistry.definition: Batches released without deviation or rework / total batches
biKpiRegistry.notes: Sustained above target for three consecutive months.

biKpiRegistry.title: Gross Margin %
biKpiRegistry.notes: API cost inflation eroding margin on key generics.

biKpiRegistry.title: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE)
biKpiRegistry.definition: Availability x Performance x Quality across packaging lines
biKpiRegistry.notes: Line 3 changeover times improving after SMED rollout.

biKpiRegistry.title: Regulatory Submission On-Time Rate
biKpiRegistry.definition: Submissions filed by committed date / total planned submissions
biKpiRegistry.notes: Awaiting Q1 close to populate actuals.
